parameters.text:
👋 Hi! I'm your *Fridge Friend Bot*!

Send me a 📸 photo of your ingredients and I'll:
1. Detect what you have
2. Suggest recipes with full steps!

Just snap a pic to get started! 🍳
📸 Got your photo! Analysing your ingredients with AI... please wait a moment ⏳

parameters.fileId: ={{ (() => { const photos = $('Telegram Trigger3').item.json.message.photo || []; return photos.length ? photos[photos.length - 1].file_id : ''; })() }}

parameters.text: Analyze this image and list all visible food ingredients/items. Return a bullet list with just the names (no explanations). If something is unclear, label it as 'unsure'.

parameters.name: ingredients
parameters.value: ="{{ $('Build Ingredient Summary3').item.json.ingredients_for_recipe.replace('here are the visible food ingredients/items:,', '') }}"
